pkgmetadata.longdescription: LibClang package provides direct bindings to libclang. This should be enough for parsing C/C++ code, walking the AST and querying nodes and completion queries. NOTE .. When configuring, please ensure llvm-config is in path .. or provide the location of libclang and llvm includes .. if not in the default locations using --configure-option=-I... .. You can also use --configure-option=--enable-llvm-shared=LLVMSHAREDLIB_PREFIX .. if you'd like to link to the shared library
